overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a sunlit canyon with dense trees, transitioning to an open rocky landscape with water features. The character performs a 180-degree turn before emerging from the tree cover into the open area.

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to face the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon, then turning around to head back toward the open area

entered.detail: rocky canyon wall covered with vegetation on the left side
rocky canyon wall with sparse trees on the right side
thick line of green trees lining the left side of the path
thick line of green trees lining the right side of the path
dry dirt and rock ground surface of the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon enclosed by rocky walls and dense tree lines on both sides. The ground is dry dirt and rock. At around 26 seconds, the character turns around to face the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky landscape with water pools

events.description: emerges from the tree-lined canyon into an open rocky area with visible water pools

agents.ego_description: walking through the open rocky terrain alongside water features and rock formations

entered.detail: large weathered rock formations and boulders scattered throughout the open area
calm pools of water reflecting the sky, situated along the walking path
tall rocky cliff faces visible in the background beyond the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide rocky landscape with scattered boulders and calm water pools. The character walks along the water's edge through the open terrain, with distant cliffs visible under a bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit rocky landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dry dirt path enclosed by steep rocky walls and dense lines of trees. As the character performs a 180-degree turn, the narrow corridor gives way to an expansive vista of scattered boulders and calm water pools. The scene then expands further as the character walks along the water's edge, moving through the open terrain toward distant cliffs under a bright blue sky.
